channel.title: BUT DID YOU WIN | Paid Media Insights
channel.description: Independent analysis and insights on paid media optimization, Google Ads, Meta Ads, and marketing accountability from Kay Inoue.

item.title: 5 Signs Your Paid Media Accounts Need a Fresh Set of Eyes
item.description: Even well-managed paid media accounts accumulate inefficiencies over time. Here are five symptoms that suggest it's time for an independent evaluation.
item.author: kay@butdidyouwin.com (Kay Inoue)

item.title: The True Cost of Wasted Ad Spend
item.description: Understanding how inefficient paid media campaigns impact your bottom line beyond the obvious metrics.
item.author: kay@butdidyouwin.com (Kay Inoue)

item.title: Why Percentage-Based Pricing Creates Conflicts of Interest
item.description: An examination of how agency compensation models influence the advice you receive about your ad spend.
item.author: kay@butdidyouwin.com (Kay Inoue)
